_description: Mock platform policy changes. Used by PolicyTool to check whether a policy shift could explain a metric change.

policies.title: Electronics authenticity verification tightened (DE/UK)
policies.summary: New authenticity checks require sellers to submit invoices for high-value Electronics. Many listings were temporarily delisted, reducing live listings and GMV.

policies.title: Seller fee restructure for cross-border
policies.summary: Final value fee increased by 1.2% for cross-border transactions, prompting some sellers to reduce listings or raise prices.

policies.title: Promoted Listings ad rate cap raised
policies.summary: Higher ad rate ceiling let top sellers bid more aggressively, increasing traffic to promoted Electronics and Fashion listings.

policies.title: Returns window extended to 60 days
policies.summary: Longer returns window modestly improved conversion rate across categories.
